CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ABIGAIL LEE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file and serve Amended and Supplemental Complaint forthwith. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABIGAIL LEE'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Proof of Service on file indicated electronic service on October 1, 2020. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
